trivia_bullets.text: Jeskai (Blue-Red) sorcery from Khans of Tarkir (2014-09-26). The Jeskai Way prizes wisdom and disciplined mastery; 'The Way' is both the clan's name and their central philosophy.
sources: Wizards: Planeswalker's Guide to Khans of Tarkir (via WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: 'The Way has no beginning and no end. It is simply the path.' — Narset, khan of the Jeskai. Narset is a human monk, neurodivergent character, and former planeswalker who served as Jeskai khan in the original KTK timeline before planeswalking and later being desparked.

Illustrated by Howard Lyon, who posted this card on his personal blog on 2014-09-12 and described it as 'one of my favorite cards of late,' noting that he 'really enjoyed painting the background' and hoped the setting read as beautiful. Lyon planned a process-documentation follow-up post.
Hand-size-matters burn sorcery at 5 mana ({3}{U}{R}). EDHREC rank 16,954; penny_rank 15,646, placing it in budget Commander territory for hand-size decks.

related_cards.name: Narset, Enlightened Master
related_cards.note: Flavor text speaker; Legendary Jeskai Khan commander
